title: CT11.N01 completed discharge record — Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT11.N01, the definition node “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R” of tactic CT11 (Localization). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT11.N01. It must be exactly `CT11`, selecting Localization (localization) as the tactic that owns the definition step “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R”. It must be exactly `CT11.N01` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT11.N01 within tactic CT11 (Localization). It must be exactly 1, matching the N01 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT11.N01. It must be exactly `defined`, meaning that the required definition or recorded branch-state object has been supplied for the definition obligation “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT11.N01. The array must contain `S-Def`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Def` to occur in CT11.N01's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data for the obligation “Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT11.N01 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Def (subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Def` evidence instance at CT11.N01. It must be exactly `S-Def`, identifying the contract that constructs a typed object deterministically from recorded branch-state data; the same instance must supply subject, sourceStateFields, constructor, parameters, evidence.

statement.informal: Define or verify: Definition — additive budget B(R)<0 on residual region R

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
